standardization_rule: Regress or percentile-standardize PEF within age sex height strata after codebook verification
notes: Do not compute until PEF units and height units are verified.

component: Frailty Index or modified Fried phenotype
standardization_rule: Use FI if enough deficits are mapped; otherwise modified Fried phenotype with documented components
notes: Define robust pre-frail frail thresholds before modeling.

standardization_rule: Within-wave z score or percentile composite after biomarker units are verified
notes: Use as optional domain if biomarker coverage is insufficient.

standardization_rule: Use as covariates subgroup or sensitivity factors rather than mandatory CRVI biology domain
notes: Do not interpret as a biological CRVI component.

standardization_rule: Exclude prevalent disease for incident analyses after baseline status is verified
notes: Not equivalent to spirometric COPD unless objective spirometry exists.

standardization_rule: Define robust/pre-frail/frail transition using mapped FI or Fried-like phenotype
notes: Death should be handled as absorbing or competing state.

standardization_rule: Define incident or worsening ADL/IADL limitation after item mapping
notes: Use when CLD event count is insufficient.

standardization_rule: Use verified death status and timing source
notes: Do not infer death from missing follow-up alone.
